title: FAQ of the week

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
We thought it would be cool to share the most frequently asked question/group of questions, on our support this week and to share this every week!

This week, most users asked about our automations:

  • What kind of automations we have available
  • How to set up automations
  • Specific automation requests

Automations are a super cool way for being more productive. They let you focus on what matters, leaving the manual and repetitive actions in your monday account to us!

You can find out all the information about automations in this article: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001222900-monday-com-Automations?abcb=91220

Let us know if you have any questions about automations in your monday account by commenting below - we’d love to help!
